page_content:
Prerequisite: HESP606.

Recommended: HESP645.

HESP648 Clinical Practice in Speech (1-3 Credits)

Supervised training in the application of clinical methods in the diagnosis and treatment of speech disorders.

Restriction: Permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

HESP648A Clinical Practice in Speech: Diagnostic Procedures (1-3 Credits)

Supervised training in the application of clinical methods in the diagnosis of speech disorders.
